creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Rusty,

thanks for submitting this update, however I do not manage to fetch the
new archive from this link:

http://www.ringofsaturn.com/distfiles/ASSP_1.9.2.9-Install.zip

I have been trying for a couple of days now but still no luck.
Do you have any idea of what the issue is?

Thanks,
Frederic
